level_signals: Founding Growth Strategist role — implies high ownership and autonomy
Expected to build new programs from 0.5 to 100
Partners directly with Head of CX and product/engineering leadership

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Passion for Clay: This is the #1 most important thing for this role. Loving Clay is easy, but you need to genuinely be Clay's #1 fan to thrive in this position as you will spend a lot of time in the product and be responsible for helping customers feel the same passion you do
Domain Expertise: You can walk the walk and talk the talk of all things B2B SaaS and go-to-market operations.
Customer-Facing Experience: You have worked directly with customers in prior roles in some capacity (doesn't have to have been through a CSM role).
Customer Value Obsessed and Revenue Minded: You aren't afraid to talk about money and expand a customer contract, but you do this in a way that always has a customer's absolute best interest in mind.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Major bonus points for prior experience in revops, markops or other go-to-market operator roles in-house or at an agency.

scope.surface: Self-serve customer base onboarding, adoption, and expansion; founding Growth Strategist role under Head of CX
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS, product-led growth with self-serve plans
primary_metrics_inferred: Time-to-first-value (speed to launch first use case)
Product adoption rate on self-serve plans
core_responsibilities: Own onboarding and implementation metric — how fast customers launch first use case and get value from Clay
Use data via Clay to proactively reach out to high priority customers on self-serve plans
Drive expansion of customer plans through successful onboarding and adoption
Partner with Head of CX to build new customer programs from 0.5 to 100
Synthesize customer feedback and share with engineering, design, and product teams

compensation.equity_form: community equity round mentioned for customers and partners; employee equity implied by tender offer mentions

green_flags: High-growth company: $100M ARR, $5B valuation, Sequoia/CapitalG/First Round backed
Founding role with significant ownership and program-building opportunity
Company itself is the primary tool used — strong product-mission alignment for the right candidate
Equity mentioned including tender offers suggesting meaningful employee liquidity
Unique culture with stated investment in employee development (world-class coaching offered)
red_flags: No location type, city, or remote policy stated anywhere in the JD
Role scope is broad and loosely defined for a 'founding' position — expectations may shift significantly as team scales
